content:
Way more than 6%
It also halfs the time to charge max
Which means it perfectly aligns with red stance rotation
AND doubles exalt dmg against mobs
GDoll feels really optional with Xu. She really just wants someone to ramp poison with and some way of not dying during the ramp.
But I generally default to Xu, Numph, GDoll, Salv atm
Yeah Ive been using her and Nymph
Honestly I think you could run Xu/Nymph/Salv/Agrippa and get the same results that a E1 GDoll gets you
